title: Tuxedo Cat of Undying
description: Changes the Totem of Undying to a 3d model of tuxedo cat.
body:
# Tuxedo Cat of Undying 🐾

Ever wanted a Totem of Undying with a touch of feline elegance? This mod replaces the standard Totem of Undying with a 3D model of a cute minecraft tuxedo cat.

## Features:
- Fully 3D tuxedo cat model as your Totem of Undying
- Lightweight and compatible with any resource packs
- That kitty is big when thrown on the ground but the item hitbox stays the same
- Supports putting the totem on item frame, shelf and even player head!
- With this resourcepack you can get nine lives, use them wisely :3
